ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country (people per square kilometer) */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Form of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator data */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate (per 1,000 people) */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions (metric tons per capita) */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage (kWh per capita) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP (current US$) */,
  "health_exp_pct_gdp" REAL /* Health expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Internet usage (percentage of population) */,
  "life_expectancy_female" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth, female (years) */,
  "life_expectancy_male" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth, male (years) */,
  "mobile_phone_usage" REAL /* Mobile phone usage (subscriptions per 100 people) */,
  "population_0to14" REAL /* Population aged 0-14 (percentage of total population) */,
  "population_15to64" REAL /* Population aged 15-64 (percentage of total population) */,
  "population_65plus" REAL /* Population aged 65+ (percentage of total population) */,
  "population_total" REAL /* Total population */,
  "population_urban" REAL /* Urban population (percentage of total population) */,
  "tourism_inbound" REAL /* Inbound tourism (number of arrivals) */,
  "tourism_outbound" REAL /* Outbound tourism (number of departures) */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient, a measure of income inequality */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "internet_speed_avg" REAL /* Average internet speed (in Mbps) */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in total energy consumption */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this indicator */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_total" REAL /* Total population of the region */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "subregion_description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the subregion in square kilometers */,
  "population_total" REAL /* Total population of the subregion */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the subregion information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data is for */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session (in seconds) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed (in bytes) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being quality checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Description of any issues found during the quality check */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the quality record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
